hero.title: Your Burger, Your Way
hero.subtitle: Ready-to-cook burger boxes with fresh ingredients, you just grill it

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: How to prepare your premium Burgo Box at home
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our selection and select the box that fits your taste and family size
howItWorks.step2Desc: Grill the fresh patty your way and assemble the sandwich using the included fresh toppings
howItWorks.step3Desc: Experience restaurant-quality premium burgers made by your own hands at home

products.title: Choose Your Box
products.subtitle: Every box is ready-to-grill, all ingredients included
products.categoryBoxesDesc: Ready-to-grill burger boxes with all fresh ingredients
products.categoryAppetizersDesc: The crispiest appetizers crafted with care
products.categoryAddonsDesc: Add your favorite sauces and flavors to your box
products.noProducts: No burger boxes available right now

box_1.name: BURGO Family Box
box_1.tagline: The complete family experience for home burger pros.
ingredients: 6 premium Angus beef patties stuffed with American cheddar cheese, 150g each (total 900g pure Angus)
prepSteps: Preheat grill or pan on high heat
Grill patties for 4-5 minutes per side (do not press down to keep cheddar inside)
Lightly toast buffalo buns with butter
Distribute pickles and your favorite sauces and assemble sandwiches

box_2.name: BURGO 4x4 Box
box_2.tagline: The perfect size for small groups and get-togethers done right.
ingredients: 4 premium Angus beef patties stuffed with American cheddar cheese, 150g each (total 600g pure Angus)
prepSteps: Preheat grill or pan on high heat
Grill patties for 4-5 minutes per side (do not press down to keep cheddar inside)
Lightly toast buffalo buns with butter
Distribute pickles and your favorite sauces and assemble sandwiches

box_3.name: BURGO Du Box
box_3.tagline: The ideal choice for two people or late-night cravings needing power and pampering.
ingredients: 2 premium Angus beef patties stuffed with American cheddar cheese, 150g each (total 300g pure Angus)
prepSteps: Preheat grill or pan on high heat
Grill patties for 4-5 minutes per side (do not press down to keep cheddar inside)
Lightly toast buffalo buns with butter
Distribute pickles and your favorite sauces and assemble sandwiches

box_4.name: French Fries (200g)
box_4.tagline: Crispy and golden french fries prepared with the highest quality.
prepSteps: Heat oil or air fryer
Fry until golden and crispy
Season and serve hot

box_5.name: Crinkle-cut Fries (200g)
box_5.tagline: Wonderfully crispy crinkle-cut fries with rich seasoning.
prepSteps: Fry in hot oil for 4-5 minutes
Drain well
Serve with ketchup or cheese dip

box_6.name: Onion Rings (200g)
box_6.tagline: Crispy American onion rings, carefully prepared to be the perfect companion to your meal.
prepSteps: Deep fry until deep golden brown
Serve hot immediately

box_7.name: Angus Burger Patty (150g)
box_7.tagline: Premium Angus beef patty stuffed with rich American cheddar cheese for an unforgettable experience.
prepSteps: Grill on high heat
Do not press down to keep cheddar inside

box_8.name: Buffalo Bread
box_8.tagline: Fresh, soft, and daily baked buffalo bread to add the perfect touch to any sandwich.
prepSteps: Split and toast on grill with butter

box_9.name: Pickled Cucumber (100g)
box_9.tagline: Crispy American pickles carefully selected to add the perfect tangy kick to your burger.
prepSteps: Add on top of the cooked patty and cheese

box_10.name: BBQ Sauce (25g)
box_10.tagline: Rich and smoky BBQ sauce perfect for dipping and adding grill flavor.
prepSteps: Serve as dip or spread on bun

box_11.name: Ranch Sauce (25g)
box_11.tagline: Creamy ranch sauce packed with garlic and herb flavors.
prepSteps: Serve as dip for fries or onion rings

box_12.name: Cheddar Cheese Sauce (15g)
box_12.tagline: Warm, rich, and creamy cheddar cheese sauce to make your meal irresistibly cheesy.
prepSteps: Pour over fries or burger

box_13.name: Ketchup Sauce (140g)
box_13.tagline: Premium tomato ketchup for dipping to bring out the best burger and fries flavors.
prepSteps: Serve as dip

box_15.name: 4 Pieces Burger (600g)
box_15.tagline: Stuffed with rich, premium American cheddar cheese.
prepSteps: Grill on high heat
Do not press down to keep cheddar inside

box_16.name: 1 Kg Burger (7 Patties - 1050g)
box_16.tagline: Stuffed with rich, premium American cheddar cheese.
prepSteps: Grill on high heat
Do not press down to keep cheddar inside
